headline: Ayyoub Bouaddi
body: Manchester City have discussed whether to loan Ayyoub Bouaddi back to Lille as part of any proposal. Lille favour offers (loan or pre-agreement) that keep the Moroccan midfielder at the club for a further season.⬇️ Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) Ayyoub Bouaddi being tracked by multiple Premier League clubs. Lille prefer a summer 2027 transfer.🇲🇦 givemesport.com/liverpool-ar… Link Ayyoub Bouaddi Update Emerges With Lille Ready to Sell Arsenal and Liverpool Target Lille are ready to sell the talented teenager this summer amid Premier League interest givemesport.com —
raw_text:
Manchester City have discussed whether to loan Ayyoub Bouaddi back to Lille as part of any proposal. Lille favour offers (loan or pre-agreement) that keep the Moroccan midfielder at the club for a further season.⬇️


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Ayyoub Bouaddi being tracked by multiple Premier League clubs.

Lille prefer a summer 2027 transfer.🇲🇦

Lille are ready to sell the talented teenager this summer amid Premier League interest

text:
🚨🇲🇦 Manchester City held initial talks for Ayyoub Bouaddi as potential target for the future.

There are 4 clubs involved, PSG not advancing yet having different top priorities.

#MCFC keen on Bouaddi with possible plan to let him stay at Lille until start of season 2027/28.
